compiled_state.title: brainstorm: argument is feature description -> epic selection list shown instead of starting dialogue
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: When /dso:brainstorm is invoked with a feature description as the argument (e.g., /dso:brainstorm We need to create a stronger distinction...), the skill incorrectly displays the full list of existing 0-child epics and asks the user to choose. It should detect that a feature description was provided (not a ticket ID) and immediately begin the Socratic dialogue with that description as seeding context.

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral — ticket references agent guidance/skill behavior gap. Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed.
comments.author: Test
